reference: Hi, I am two months pregnant and my Thyroid Stimulating Hormone level is eight point seven seven. I have my appointment with the gynecologist today evening, but meanwhile, I just want to check if eight point seven seven is concerning. I remember taking a thyroid test some time ago and noticed it was perfectly normal. What made this Thyroid Stimulating Hormone level go high all of a sudden? Please help.
text: Hi, I'm Kimo's pregnant, and my thyroid-stimulating hormone level is 8.77. I had my appointment with the gynecologist today evening, but meanwhile, I just want to check if 8.77 is concerning. I remember taking a thyroid test some time ago, and noticed it was perfectly normal. What made this thyroid-stimulating hormone level go high all of a sudden? It was how it...
